One million dollars additional
Indebtedness will be saddled on
the city il two ordinances filed to-
day with the city clerk are passed
by the city council


One of the ordinances is for the
purpose of issuing bonds for the
amount of 100000 to be used to
build and repair bridges across the
Spokane river, another way of
saying ito build the Monroe street
bridge


The other ordinance is to issue
bonds for 100000 TO pay of all
outstanding bonds issued by the
water extension department of the
municipality. The argument in
favor of the latter issue Is the
fact that the old bonds now draw
6 per cent interest, while the new
bond issue would draw in the
ne,ghborhood of "A per cent.


Both of the ordinances We're pre-.
pared by Corporation Counsel
Hamblen-n accordance with the
resolutions passed at recent
meeting cf the council.

fes no bridges in particular for
